alt: Spectacular high-res shot of Hoatzin perched in the Amazonian trees of Rio Napo
caption: The hoatzin is a legendary, spectacular Amazonian bird famous for its spiky crest and extraordinary digestive system.
attributionText: Photo by Charles J. Sharp via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0
attributionHtml: Photo by Charles J. Sharp via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 4.0
acquisitionNotes: High-resolution hoatzin hero image showcasing its distinctive spiky crest. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/b/b3/Hoatzin_%28Opisthocomus_hoazin%29_Rio_Napo_2.jpg
